title.en: Qinglian and Qingxue, the two controllers, said...

content.en:
The half-tooth controller came to the Qinglian Giant City, and naturally attracted the attention of the Qinglian controller for the first time.

However, the body of the Qinglian controller is not in the Qinglian Giant City, only a main battle incarnation is here.

Of course, Qinglian Giant City still has the essence of an eternal controller, the Qingxue controller of Qinglian Giant City, and the sworn sister of Qinglian Giant.

Airplanes!

The incarnation of the Blue Lotus Controller appeared with the Blue Snow Controller, standing in front of the Half Tooth Controller.

"I've seen the Half-Tooth Master!"

Qinglian and Qingxue, the two controllers, said respectfully.

"Qinglian master, long time no see. "

The half-tooth controller said lightly.

As for Qing Xue, the eternal master, who has not been in control for a long time, he is not familiar with it at all, and he doesn't care, so he ignores the other party, after all, the other party is too weak, and he is qualified to ignore it.

"It's been a long time, you've been missing for a long time, and you didn't expect to come to me as soon as you appeared. The Blue Lotus Controller smiled.

She was indeed a little surprised, although she knew the half-tooth master, but the relationship was average.

Moreover, the Half-Tooth Controller is indeed very powerful, much more powerful than her, so the Half-Tooth Controller would not have visited her before.

This time it came as soon as it appeared, and it was indeed unexpected for her.

However, she thought too much, and the half-tooth master did not come to visit her.

The half-tooth controller said: "Qinglian master, I came to Qinglian Giant City to meet a junior, he happens to be a creature in the eternal realm where you are, I will go to meet him, you have no opinion." "

"Junior, could it be Ye Tian?"

The Qinglian controller was surprised.

She knew that there was a very demonic junior in the Void Region, who was called the Endless Lord, and his real name was Ye Tian.

Ye Tian even passed the ninth level of the Half-tooth Ancient Tower, but she didn't care too much, because she wouldn't accept any more apprentices, so she didn't pay much attention.

Besides, as long as you don't enter the Eternal Master, you are not eligible for her approval.

"Indeed, it's him!" the half-tooth master admitted.

The Qinglian controller said curiously: "Half-tooth master, do you want to accept Ye Tian as an apprentice? You haven't accepted an apprentice for a long time, right?"

"Haha, I'm not taking him as an apprentice, there are some things I can't reveal conveniently, but he does have a relationship with me. The Halftooth Controller said with a smile.

The Qinglian controller did not stop the half-tooth controller, after all, the half-tooth controller was stronger than her, even if her body was here, she would not dare to stop the half-tooth controller.

Besides, the half-tooth master is just coming to see a junior, and she won't stop it.

In this way, the half-tooth master entered the Blue Lotus Giant City.

excessive

Airplanes!

The surrounding time and space suddenly found a change, and Ye Tian's courtyard disappeared.

He suddenly found himself in a special area of time and space, and a figure appeared here.

"Eternal Master!"

Ye Tian immediately realized that the person in front of him was an eternal master, and he was not one of the several eternal controllers of Qinglian Giant City.

Qinglian Giant City has an eternal controller in charge, and the other party must have said hello, otherwise there will be a battle of eternal controllers.

Therefore, he was not so worried.

"I've seen my seniors!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

The half-tooth master looked at Ye Tian carefully, and said with a slight smile: "It seems that you have cultivated the secret of swallowing to a very good realm." "

Swallow the Secret!

Outsiders don't know what the ninth level of the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower is, and even if they do, they don't know the name of the Swallowing Secret, but the eternal controller in front of him actually knows the Swallowing Secret.

Then there are only two possibilities for his identity, one is the master of the secret of swallowing, and the other is the half-tooth master.

How powerful the Secret of Swallowing is, the Eternal Master who can create the Secret of Swallowing is absolutely unimaginable, so the Eternal Master in front of him is most likely the Half-Tooth Master.

Ye Tian didn't use the copying talent to probe the other party, because the eternal controller controls everything, maybe he can detect the existence of the copying talent.

Therefore, he would not rashly use the talent of copying to spy on the Eternal Master.

"You're not nervous at all, do you know who I am?" asked the half-tooth master.

Ye Tian said truthfully: "The senior should be the half-tooth master, right?"

"Hahahaha, yes, I'm indeed the half-tooth master!"

The Half-Tooth Holder nodded.

Ye Tian didn't know why the half-tooth master suddenly found him, could it be that he wanted to take him as an apprentice, but he wouldn't ask like this, so he said, "Do you have any instructions from the seniors to find the juniors?"

The half-tooth master said, "I'm just coming to see you and tell you something by the way." "

"Senior, please speak. "

Ye Tianxi listened attentively.

The Half-Tooth Master began to speak: "The Secret of Swallowing that you have cultivated is one of the secret techniques created by a certain great being, and even I have not practiced it, and I have only practiced it at the peak Legendary Realm Lord level, and once I have become an Eternal Master, I cannot practice it again. This secret art can also be regarded as a kind of assessment, and there is hope to become a personal disciple of that great being. "

Great Being?

Ye Tian was shocked, what kind of person was to be called a great existence by the half-tooth master!

As far as he knew, the Half-Tooth Controller was already a powerful Eternal Controller that ordinary Eternal Controllers needed to look up to, and his strength was extremely terrifying, and his reputation was like a Boundary River!

He had always guessed that the origin of the Secret of Swallowing was very ordinary, but now it seemed that he had underestimated its origin.

The half-tooth master continued: "It is very difficult to become the personal disciple of that great existence, even I am only a registered disciple of the other party, and I cannot be called a disciple of that great existence in the outside world. You have hope, but it is still very difficult to truly become the disciple of the other party. I'm just here to give you a little bit of advice, and if you can become the other party's disciple, I can be regarded as having a little credit. "

"You don't need to know the name of the Great Being at this time. But I know that the three tests of the Great Being, if you complete them, you will be eligible to become the other person's personal disciple under the Eternal Master. The first assessment is the Secret of Swallowing or one of several other secret arts, and you are considered complete. The second test is to kill an Eternal Master head-on with the strength of a half-step Eternal Master, which is a kill, not a defeat. And it is in the case that the other party is not injured (Zhao is good), otherwise it will be considered a failure. As for the third test, I don't know, but if you complete the second test, the Great Being will convey to you the content of the third test. "

Ye Tian was stunned, what kind of test was this.

In the realm of a half-step Eternal Master, killing an Eternal Master is many times more difficult than becoming an Eternal Master!

Even if he is a weak Eternal Master, he can kill a half-step Eternal Master with just one hand, and he can hardly see any hope of completion!

"Do you feel like you can't finish it?"

The half-tooth master asked with a smile.

"Sort of!"

Ye Tianying is a brother.

At this moment, the half-tooth master revealed a secret, and said: "Actually, you still have hope to complete it, although there is little hope, but I can show you a clear way." "

Ye Tian was suddenly pleasantly surprised, and hurriedly asked the half-tooth master.

"Half-tooth master, please give me some pointers!"
